  • 1 can black olives, optional
  • 1 small pkg of shredded cheddar cheese
  • 1 small container of sour cream

Instructions

Blend cream cheese and taco seasoning. Spread on baking dish. Layer on sour cream and salsa. Top with diced tomato and black olives. Sprinkle cheddar cheese on top.

item.title: Party Cheese Ball
item.description:
Submitted by Kelly and Kyle Jolley

Friends of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 2-250 gr pkgs of Philly cream cheese
  • 2 cups shredded, old cheddar cheese
  • 1 tsbp each of chopped red peppers, green peppers and onions
  • 3 tbsp mayonnaise
  • 2 tsp Worcestershire sauce
  • 1 tsp each of seasoning salt, onion salt and garlic salt
  • 1 tsp real lemon juice
  • dash of cayenne pepper
  • pinch of salt

Instructions

Cream cheeses, add remaining ingredients and mix. Chill for one hour. Shape into ball and roll in chopped pecans.

item.title: Nacho Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Kathy Genore and Paul Hamilton

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 package Philadelphia cream cheese
  • 2 tbsp mayonnaise
  • 1 small jar salsa
  • 2 green onions, finely chopped
  • 1 tomato, finely chopped
  • approximately 2 cups finely grated cheddar cheese (marble
  • works well)

Instructions

Cream Philly and mayonnaise together, spread over bottom of dish, not quite to the edges. Pour salsa over cream cheese mixture. Sprinkle chopped green onions and tomato over salsa. Cover with grated cheddar cheese.

item.title: Mexi-Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Margot Bell and Darryl Fleguel

Sister and Brother-in-law of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 500 mL sour cream
  • 1 pkg taco seasoning mix
  • 1 tomato, diced
  • shredded lettuce
  • 1-2 green onions, chopped
  • ½ lb grated cheddar cheese

Instructions

Layer:

Mix sour cream with taco seasoning mix. On top of sour cream mixture, add cheese, lettuce, diced tomato, and onions.

Serve with taco chips. Easyandyummy!

item.title: Hot Crab Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Mary and John Willemsen

Friends of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1/2 cup milk
  • 1/3 cup salsa
  • 3-8 oz packages of cream cheese, cubed
  • 2-8 oz packages of mock crab, flaked
  • 1 cup thinly sliced green onions
  • 1-4 oz can of chopped green chillies
  • assorted crackers

Instructions

Combine milk and salsa in a bowl. Transfer to a slow cooker coated with non-stick cooking spray. Stir in cream cheese, crab, onions and chillies. Cover and cook on low for 3-4 hours, stirring every 30 minutes. Serve with crackers. Yields 5 cups.

item.title: Guacamole Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Margot Bell and Darryl Fleguel

Sister and Brother-in-law of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 2 ripe avocados, peeled and mashed
  • 2 tbsp lemon juice
  • 2 tsp onion flakes
  • 1 tsp salt (optional)
  • ¼ tsp cayenne pepper
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • ¼ tsp garlic powder
  • 1 ripe tomato, diced

Instructions

Mix all ingredients together. Serve with corn chips, tortilla chips or fresh, raw veggies. Makes about 1 cup.

item.title: Traditional Gingerbread Man Cookies
item.description:
Submitted by Stephanie and Shawn Thomas

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 5 to 5 ½ cups all-purpose flour
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 2 tsp ginger
  • 2 tsp cinnamon
  • 1 tsp nutmeg
  • 1 tsp cloves
  • 1 cup shortening
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1 ¼ cups unsulphured molasses
  • 2 eggs, beaten

Instructions

Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Thoroughly mix flour, soda, salt and spices. Melt shortening in large saucepan. Cool slightly. Add sugar, molasses and eggs. Mix well. Add four cups of dry ingredients and mix well. Turn mixture onto lightly floured surface. Knead in remaining dry ingredients by hand. Add a little more flour, if necessary, to make a firm dough. Roll out on a lightly floured surface to ¼ inch thickness for cut-out cookies. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet (small and medium-sized cookies for 6-10 minutes, large cookies for 10-15 minutes). One recipe of this dough will yield 2 to 3 dozen average-sized cookies.

item.title: Refrigerator Balls
item.description:
Submitted by Buddy Pierce

Nephew/Godson of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 can of Eaglebrand
  • 3 cups miniature marshmallows
  • ½ cup maraschino cherries, chopped
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 2 ½ cups graham cracker crumbs

Instructions

Mix all ingredients together. Butter hands and roll into 1 inch balls. Roll in fine coconut.

Refrigerate. Makes about 60.

Uncle Billy’s favorite!!

item.title: Oile Bolen (Dutch Donut)
item.description:
Submitted by Audrey and John Gosson

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 3 eggs
  • ½ cup sugar
  • ½ cup corn syrup
  • 4 ½ cups flour
  • 5 tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 tsp nutmeg
  • 3 tbsp melted shortening or salad oil
  • ½ cup milk
  • apples chopped in small pieces, raisins and candied fruit-
  • should equal 2 cups total

Instructions

Beat egg yolks until thick. Add sugar gradually and then corn syrup. Mix shortening or oil with milk and stir into the egg and sugar mixture.

item.title: Granny Gosson's Ginger Sparklers
item.description:
Submitted by Heather Bell

Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 cups flour
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 2 tsp ginger
  • ¼ cup molasses
  • ¾ cup margarine
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 1 egg
  • 1 ½ tsp baking soda
  • ½ tsp cinnamon

Instructions

In a large bowl, cream sugar, margarine, egg and molasses. In a separate bowl, combine dry ingredients. Blend dry ingredients into cream mixture.

Roll batter into balls and place on a greased cookie sheet. Using a fork, gently press down on balls to flatten slightly. Sprinkle cookies with sugar. Bake at 375 degrees for 8-10 minutes.

item.title: Cookie Candies
item.description:
Submitted by Michelle and Jesse Webster

Cousins of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 cup soft butter
  • ¾ cup icing sugar
  • 1 tbsp vanilla
  • 2 cups flour & ¾ tsp salt sifted together
  • ½ cup rolled oats
  • ½ cup semi sweet chocolate pieces
  • ½ cup milk
  • sprinkles of your choice

Instructions

Mix butter, sugar and vanilla. Cream well. Add flour mixture (sifted) and rolled oats. With hands, make into balls, roll into logs or use cookie cutters. Cook at 325 degrees for 20 minutes.

item.title: Boiled Raisin Cookies
item.description:
Submitted by Jenny Navid

Aunt of the Bride

  • 2 cups raisins
  • 1 cup water

Boil together for 5 minutes.

Ingredients

  • 4 cups flour
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 2 cups white sugar
  • 1 cup shortening
  • 3 eggs
  • 1 tsp nutmeg
  • 1 tsp allspice
  • ½ cup chopped nuts
  • 2 tsp cinnamon

Instructions

Mix dry ingredients. Add beaten eggs with the raisins and water. Drop by the tablespoon onto a cookie sheet.

item.title: Tomato Soup Potatoes
item.description:
Submitted by Hazel Pigeau

Grandmother of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 lb hamburg
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 5 or 6 medium potatoes, sliced
  • 1 can Heinz tomato soup

Instructions

Brown hamburg and onions. Place potatoes in a greased casserole dish. Add hamburg and onions. Mix in tomato soup.

Cook at 350 degrees for 1 hour, or until potatoes are tender.

item.title: Pork Chop and Vegetable Casserole
item.description:
Submitted by Linda and Mike Gosson

Parents of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 4 pork chops
  • 4 medium potatoes, thinly sliced
  • 2 tomatoes, chopped
  • 4 carrots, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup onion, chopped
  • ½ cup green pepper, diced
  • 1 tsp salt
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • 2 chicken bouillon cubes
  • 1 ½ cups boiling water
  • 2 tbsp butter

Instructions

Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Trim fat from chops. Brown chops on both sides, season with salt and pepper to taste.

item.title: Perogy Lazy Boy
item.description:
Submitted by Kim and Raymond Roy

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 10 lasagna noodles
  • 6 cups mashed potatoes (about 12 medium potatoes)
  • 3 cups grated, medium cheddar cheese
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 ¼ cup butter or margarine
  • 2 cups chopped onions
  • bacon bits if desired

Instructions

Cook noodles according to directions on the package.

Line the bottom of a greased 9x13 inch pan with some of the noodles. In large bowl, mix mashed potatoes with cheese and salt. Place a layer of this mixture on top of the noodles. Put second layer of noodles over top and so on.

item.title: Lazy Perogy Casserole
item.description:
Submitted by Joyce Roy

Aunt of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 9 lasagna noodles
  • 2 cups (1-500 gm container) of cottage cheese
  • 1 egg
  • 1/4 tsp onion salt
  • 2 cups shredded cheddar cheese (old)
  • 2 cups mashed potatoes
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper
  • 1/2 cup butter or margarine
  • 1 cup chopped onions and bacon

Instructions

Line a 9x13 inch pan with cooked noodles. Mix cottage cheese, egg and salt together. Spoon over noodles.

item.title: Kapusta
item.description:
Submitted by Rachel and Wayne Pigeau

Godparents/Aunt and Uncle of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 3 or 4 onions, chopped
  • ¼ cup butter
  • 1 jar of sauerkraut
  • 1 cup of Uncle Ben’s rice
  • 2 cups of water
  • chicken cubes for broth

Instructions

Cook onions in butter until soft. Mix chicken cubes in water. Add rice and cook for 20 minutes until water is absorbed.

In a casserole dish, mix rice, onions and sauerkraut and cook in a slow, 250 degree oven for about 1½ to 2 hours.

item.title: Carrot Casserole
item.description:
Submitted by Judy and Lorne Pierce

Sister and Brother-in-law of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 6 carrots, sliced (boil for about 10 minutes)
  • 1 medium onion
  • 1/4 cup margarine
  • 1/8 cup flour
  • 1 cup milk
  • grated cheese (as much as you like)
  • 1 cup cracker crumbs
  • 3/4 tsp salt
  • 1/4 tsp dry mustard
  • 1/8 tsp celery salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper

Instructions

Cook onions in margarine in microwave for 5 minutes. Add flour and spices and mix. Add milk. Cook in milk until thick, about 5-10 minutes in microwave.

item.title: Broccoli Bake
item.description:
Submitted by David Henri

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 cups white Minute Rice, cooked
  • 1 can of cream of chicken soup
  • ½ cup mayonnaise
  • lemon juice to taste
  • pepper to taste
  • salt to taste
  • ¼ tsp curry powder or more as per your taste
  • 1 head of broccoli florets
  • 2-3 skinless, boneless, cooked chicken breasts

Instructions

Place cut up, cooked chicken pieces on bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish. Place broccoli florets on top of chicken. Mix the rice, soup, mayonnaise, lemon juice and spices together. If rice mixture seems dry, add more mayonnaise. Pour over chicken and broccoli.

item.title: Yogurt Blueberry Muffins
item.description:
Submitted by Ruth Divver

Aunt of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 cup plain yogurt
  • 2 tsp baking powder
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • ½ cup oil
  • 1 egg
  • 1 cup bran
  • 2 cups flour
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup blueberries

Instructions

In a small bowl, mix yogurt andoneteaspoon of baking powder. Set aside.

In a large bowl, mix all other ingredients, including the second teaspoon of baking powder. Mix the yogurt mixture into the large bowl.

item.title: Toffee-Topped Bars
item.description:
Submitted by Monique Racine-Theriault

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 cups firmly packed brown sugar
  • 2 cups flour
  • ½ cup butter, softened
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup milk
  • 1 egg
  • 1 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips
  • ½ cup walnuts
  • ¼ cup flaked unsweetened coconut

Instructions

Mix the brown sugar and flour together. Using a pastry cutter or two knives, cut in the butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Remove one cup of mixture and set aside.

item.title: Texas Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Sherry and Paul Beaulieu

Cousins of the Bride

  • 1/2 cup margarine
  • 2 cups flour
  • 2 tsp baking soda
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1 1/2 cups white sugar
  • 2 eggs
  • 1-19 oz can of crushed pineapple

Combine all ingredients and place in a 9x13 inch glass pan. Cook at 325 degrees for 45-55 minutes. Insert a toothpick in the centre of the cake to check if it’s ready.

Sauce:

Ingredients

  • 1/2 cup margarine
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 2/3 cup Carnation milk
  • 1 cup coconut
  • 1 tsp vanilla

Instructions

Combine margarine, brown sugar and milk in a saucepan and bring to a boil. Continue boiling sauce for 5 minutes and then add coconut and vanilla.

item.title: Sucre a creme
item.description:
Submitted by Yvette and Gilles Guenette

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • 3 tasses de sucre brun
  • 2 tasses de sucre blanc
  • 5 tasses de crème
  • 4 cuillers à soupe de cornstarch
  • ¼ à ½ tasse de noix hachés

Instructions

Faire chauffer le sucre et la crème jusqu’à ébullition. Retirer du feu et ajouter le cornstarch. Diluer tout en brassant et ajouter les noix. Laisser refroidir avant de déposer dans vos tartes. Ces tartes ont un dessous et un dessus de pâte.

item.title: SINamon Buns
item.description:
Submitted by Louise Dubyk and Don Broughtor

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 cups flour
  • 2/3 cup butter or margarine
  • 2 tbsp sugar
  • 2 cups brown sugar
  • 4 tsp baking powder
  • 6-8 tsp cinnamon
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1/2 cup raisins
  • 1/4 cup cold butter
  • 1 cup cold milk

Instructions

Put flour, sugar, baking powder and salt in a large bowl. Cut in 1/4 cup of butter or margarine. Make a well in the centre. Pour milk into well. Stir to form soft dough (add a bit more milk if necessary).

item.title: Stock Club Cake with Coffee Icing
item.description:
Submitted by Dean Pigeau and Karen Cosgrove

Cousin of the Bride

Cake:

  • 1 1/2 cup flour
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1 1/2 tsp soda
  • 1/4 cup cocoa
  • 1 cup mayonnaise
  • 7/8 cup water

Bake for 1 hour or less at 350 degrees.

Coffee Icing:

Ingredients

  • 1/2 tsp coffee
  • 1 tbsp margarine
  • 2 tsp boiling water
  • 1 tsp cocoa
  • 1 cup icing sugar

Instructions

Mix coffee, margarine, water and cocoa until smooth. Slowly add icing sugar until creamy.

item.title: Sour Cream Coffee Cake with Strueusel
item.description:
Submitted by Christine and Graham Baker

Cousins of the Bride

A rich sour cream coffee cake which may be layered or simply topped with tart cranberries and spicy sweet streusel. Wonderful served warm with ice cream or whipped cream.

Streusel:

  • ¾ cup lightly packed brown sugar
  • 1 tsp cinnamon
  • ½ cup all purpose flour
  • ¼ cup butter

Mix together sugar, flour, and cinnamon. Blend in butter until crumbly.

Cake:

Ingredients

  • ½ cup soft butter
  • 2 eggs
  • 2 cups all purpose flour
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1 cup dairy sour cream
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 2 cups cranberries, fresh or frozen

Instructions

Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, then vanilla. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt. Add to creamed mixture. Add sour cream.

item.title: Skor Bars
item.description:
Submitted by Lisa and Derry Thibeault

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 box of Ritz crackers, finely crushed
  • 4 Skor chocolate bars, finely crushed
  • 1 can of Eaglebrand
  • 1 tub of chocolate icing

Instructions

Put ½ cup of Skor pieces aside for topping.

Combine Ritz crackers and Eaglebrand, mix well. Mix in remaining Skor pieces.

Pour into a greased 8x8 inch pan. Bake at 300 degrees for 20 minutes. Let cool for 20 minutes. Frost with chocolate icing and sprinkle remaining Skor pieces on top.

item.title: Rhubarb Muffins
item.description:
Submitted by Marie and Will Sayer

Cousins of the Bride

  • 3 cups rhubarb, diced
  • 1 1/3 cups whole wheat flour
  • 1 1/3 cups all purpose flour
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1 cup yogurt or sour cream
  • 1/2 cup vegetable oil
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup chopped nuts

Topping:

Ingredients

  • 1/2 cup brown sugar
  • 1/2 cup chopped nuts
  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 1 tsp cinnamon

Instructions

In a large bowl, combine rhubarb, flours, brown sugar, baking soda and salt.

item.title: Picnic Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Shirley and Rob Webster

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Cake:

  • ½ cup margarine
  • 2 cups all purpose flour
  • 1 ¼ cup white sugar
  • 1 tbsp baking powder
  • ¼ cup peanut butter
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup milk
  • 2 eggs

Cream margarine and sugar. Add peanut butter, vanilla and eggs. Beat well. In a separate bowl, blend together flour, baking powder and salt. Add to creamed mixture, alternating with milk. Mix well after each addition.

item.title: Pep's Favorite Brownies
item.description:
Submitted by Colette and Mike Peplinskie

Sister and Brother-in-law of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 ½ cup all purpose flour
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 2 cups white sugar
  • ½ cup cocoa
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup oil
  • 4 eggs
  • ¼ cup cold water
  • ½ cup (or more) chopped walnuts

Instructions

Place all ingredients in a beater bowl in the order given, ending with walnuts. Beat on low speed or by hand until smooth. Do not beat for too long.

item.title: Peppermint Squares
item.description:
Submitted by Chantal and Angus Muir

Cousins of the Groom

  • ½ cup margarine or butter
  • ¼ cup white sugar
  • 3 tsp cocoa
  • 1 egg
  • pinch of salt
  • ½ tsp vanilla

Melt above ingredients together until smooth. Add 2 cups of graham wafer crumbs and 1 cup of coconut. Press firmly into a 9x9 inch pan.

Ingredients

  • ¼ cup margarine or butter
  • 2 cups icing sugar
  • 2 tbsp hot milk
  • ½ tsp peppermint extract

Instructions

Mix above ingredients and spread over first layer in pan. Pour a mixture of 3 melted squares of semi-sweet chocolate and 1 tablespoon of margarine or butter over top. Put in the fridge. Cut into squares before it gets too hard. Store in fridge.

item.title: OREO Cookie Dessert
item.description:
Submitted by Fern Henri

Uncle of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 square box of vanilla ice cream
  • 1 container of Cool Whip

Instructions

Cut ice cream up into ½ to 1 inch thick pieces to fill the bottom of a 9 inch square pan or a 9x13 inch pan.

Crush OREO cookies until crumbly. Spread on top of ice cream. Pour chocolate syrup over cookies.

Spread Cool Whip over top. Sprinkle more crushed cookies over Cool Whip to decorate.

item.title: Mix-In-The-Pan Carrot Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Jeannine and Elmer Bell

Parents of the Groom

  • 1 cup flour
  • 1 tsp cinnamon
  • 1 ½ cup shredded carrots
  • ½ cup oil
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • ¾ cup sugar
  • ¼ tsp nutmeg
  • 2 eggs, slightly beaten
  • ¼ cup water
  • icing sugar, optional
  • ½ tsp each of salt, baking soda and baking powder

With fork, in an 8 or 9 inch square pan, mix flour, sugar, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, baking powder and nutmeg. Add carrots, eggs, oil, water and vanilla.

item.title: Malva Pudding Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Claire and Marc Massicotte

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Cake:

  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1 egg
  • 1 tbsp apricot jam
  • 1 cup flour
  • l tsp baking soda
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • generous pinch of salt
  • 1 tbsp butter
  • 1 tsp white vinegar
  • 1 cup milk

Beat the egg and sugar well with a mixer. In a separate bowl, combine the jam, sifted flour, soda, baking powder and salt. In another bowl, melt butter and add the vinegar. Add liquids to egg mixture alternately with the flour.

item.title: Ice Box Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Lorna and Zoran Popovitch

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 30 marshmallows, chopped fine
  • 30 graham wafers, rolled fine
  • 18 cherries, chopped
  • ½ cup walnuts, chopped
  • 1 can Eaglebrand Milk
  • 1 cup coconut

Instructions

Mix the first four ingredients with the can of Eaglebrand. Butter a shallow pan and spread thick with half the coconut.

Spread the Eaglebrand mixture over the coconut, then spread another layer of coconut on top. Pack well and put in the fridge for 24 hours.

item.title: Granny Sayer's Rum Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Pat and Tom Sayer

Aunt and Uncle of the Bride

  • 1 yellow Duncan Hines cake mix
  • 1 small instant Jello vanilla pudding
  • 4 eggs
  • ½ cup Crisco oil
  • ½ cup water
  • ¼ cup White Rum

Mix above ingredients together and bake in a greased bundt pan to which ¼ cup of chopped pecans has been added. Bake at 350 degrees for 55 minutes.

Topping:

In a sauce pan, combine the following:

item.title: Graham Coconut Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Margaret and Walter Smith

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • ½ cup butter, room temperature
  • 1 cup white sugar
  • 2 cups graham crumbs
  • 1 egg
  • 1 cup medium coconut
  • 1 cup milk
  • 3 tbsp flour
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • pinch of salt

Instructions

Cream butter and sugar together. Add beaten egg. Add other ingredients and mix well.

Place in a 9x9 inch pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. Serve with ice cream or whipped cream.

item.title: Drumstick Cake
item.description:
Submitted by Kevin Roy

Cousin of the Bride

Base:

  • 1 ½ cups vanilla or graham crumbs
  • ½ cup chopped peanuts or walnuts
  • ¼ cup melted butter
  • 2 tbsp peanut butter

Mix the above ingredients and place in a 9x13 inch pan. Save some of the mixture for the topping.

Filling:

Ingredients

  • 250 gr cream cheese
  • ½ cup white sugar
  • ½ cup peanut butter
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 4 eggs, add one at a time
  • 1 large container Cool Whip

Instructions

Mix the above ingredients and layer on top of the base.

item.title: Chocolate Eclair Squares
item.description:
Submitted by Amanda McCabe and Jason Simard

Friends of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 container of chocolate icing
  • 1 box of graham crackers
  • 1 pkg of instant vanilla pudding
  • ½ cup of sugar
  • 500 mL whipping cream

Instructions

Prepare vanilla pudding according to the directions on the package. Set aside.

Whip up whipping cream, slowly adding sugar until peaks form. Fold whipping cream into vanilla pudding.

Line an 8x10 inch baking dish with graham crackers. Pour in half of the pudding mixture. Cover pudding mixture with another layer of graham crackers. Pour second half of pudding mixture over graham crackers. Line mixture with graham crackers.

item.title: Chocolate Butterscotch Almond Crunch
item.description:
Submitted by Diane Laderoute

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 ¾ cup flour
  • ¾ cup white sugar
  • ¾ cup brown sugar
  • 1 cup margarine or butter
  • 2 egg yolks
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • 1 pkg milk chocolate chips
  • 1 cup slivered almonds

Instructions

Combine flour and sugars. Mix margarine in until blended. Add egg yolk and vanilla. Mix until smooth.

Press with floured fingers onto a 10x15 inch cookie sheet with sides. Bake at 350 degrees for 13-18 minutes or until light golden.

item.title: Chipits Chewy Nut Bars
item.description:
Submitted by Diane and Harold Bell

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Ingredients

  • ½ cup margarine
  • 2 cups packed brown sugar
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 ½ cup all purpose flour
  • 2 tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 cup semi-sweet Chipits
  • 1 cup coarsely chopped nuts

Instructions

Melt margarine in a large pot. Remove from heat. Add sugar and vanilla stirring until well blended. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir together flour, baking powder and salt. Add to the pot and mix well.

item.title: Cherry Chews
item.description:
Submitted by Anne Mary and Jean-Paul Racine

Aunt and Uncle of the Bride

Bottom:

  • l cup sifted flour
  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • ½ cup butter

Mix flour, oats, brown sugar, soda and salt. Add butter and mix until crumbly, first with a fork, then with fingers. Place mixture into bottom of a greased 9x13 inch pan. Bake for 10 minutes.

Filling:

  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • ½ tsp almond extract
  • 2 tbsp flour
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 cup coconut
  • ½ cup pecan halves
  • 1 cup well drained maraschino cherries, halved

Beat eggs. Stir in brown sugar, almond flavoring, flour, baking powder, salt, coconut, and maraschino cherries and stir to blend. Pour over first mixture and spread evenly. Sprinkle with pecans. Return to oven and bake 25 minutes until lightly browned. Ice with Cherry Almond icing. Cut into squares or bars to serve. Makes 2 dozen 1½x2 inch bars.

item.title: Cherry Cheesecake
item.description:
Submitted by Stella and Ben Daigle

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • 2 cups graham crumbs
  • ½ cup melted butter
  • 2 tbsp brown sugar
  • 1-8 oz pkg of Philadelphia cream cheese
  • 1 large pkg of Dream Whip
  • 1 cup white sugar
  • 1 can cherry pie filling

Instructions

Mix graham crumbs, melted butter and brown sugar together. Press into an 8x12 inch pan.

Mix Dream Whip according to directions on package. Add cream cheese and white sugar to whipped Dream Whip. Spread over graham crumbs. Top with cherry pie filling.

item.title: Caramelized Pear & Apple Bread Pudding
item.description:
Submitted by Judy and Roger Lafreniere

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 2 pears, peeled, cored and cut into ¼ inch wedges
  • 2 apples, peeled, cored and cut into ¼ inch wedges
  • ¼ cup brown sugar
  • 5 cups french bread, cut into ½ inch cubes
  • ½ cup raisins
  • ½ cup pecans, coarsely chopped
  • 2 ¼ cups real whipping cream
  • 3 eggs
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 1 tsp nutmeg
  • 1 tsp cinnamon

Instructions

In a large frying pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add fruit and cook , stirring occasionally until tender. Stir in brown sugar, increase heat and cook for 3 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in the bread, raisins and pecans. Set aside.

item.title: Caramel Pecan Cheesecake
item.description:
Submitted by Sandra Stewart

Friend of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 ready-to-use Graham pie crust
  • 20 caramel squares
  • 3 tbsp milk
  • ½ cup chopped pecans
  • 2 pkgs cream cheese, softened
  • ½ cup sugar
  • 2 eggs

Instructions

Microwave caramels and milk until melted (about 2 min; stir after 1 min). Stir in pecans and mix well. Pour into pie crust and chill for 10 minutes.

Beat (medium speed) softened cream cheese, sugar and eggs until smooth. Pour into chilled pie crust.

item.title: Blueberry Cheesecake
item.description:
Submitted by Joanne and Greg Craig

Cousins of the Bride

Crust:

  • ½ cup butter
  • 2 cups graham crumbs
  • ¼ cup sugar

Topping:

  • 2 pkgs Dream Whip
  • 1 pkg cream cheese
  • ½ cup sugar

Filling:

Ingredients

  • ¾ cup sugar
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 3 tbsp cornstarch
  • 1 tbsp butter
  • ¼ cup water
  • 1 tbsp lemon juice
  • 4 cups fresh/frozen blueberries

Note: Above filling can be substituted for 2 cans of blueberry pie filling.

item.title: Birthday Cake with German Icing
item.description:
Submitted by Louise and Dan Pigeau

Aunt and Uncle of the Bride

Cake:

  • 2 cups flour
  • 1 1/4 cup sugar
  • dash of salt
  • 3 tsp baking powder
  • 2 eggs
  • 3/4 cup oil
  • 1 tsp vanilla

Mix first four ingredients together, then add remaining ingredients. Bake at 350 degrees for 30-45 minutes

German Icing:

Ingredients

  • 1 egg, beaten
  • 2/3 cup brown sugar
  • 1/2 cup can milk
  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 1/4 tsp salt

Instructions

Boil until it starts to thicken and add 1 ½ cup of coconut and ½ cup of nuts.

item.title: Banana Cake with Caramel Icing
item.description:
Submitted by Shirley and Dave Jodouin

Cousins of the Groom

Cake:

  • 2 ½ cups flour
  • 1 ½ tsp baking soda
  • 1 ½ tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 ½ cup white sugar
  • ¼ tsp cinnamon
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup mashed bananas
  • 1 cup buttermilkor1 cup sourmilk (add 2 tbsp vinegar to your regular cup of milk)

Throw all the ingredients into a big bowl and mix. Pour into a 3 L pan that has been greased, and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted in the middle comes out clean and dry.

item.title: Apple Crisp
item.description:
Submitted by Heather Bell

Bride

Ingredients

  • 32 Ritz crackers, crushed
  • 1 ½ cups brown sugar
  • ¼ cup flour
  • ¼ tsp cinnamon
  • ½ cup butter
  • 4 cups chopped apples

Instructions

Mix all ingredients together except for the apples. Place half of the apples on the bottom of a baking dish. Add half of Ritz mixture on top of apples. Place remaining apples and then remaining Ritz mixture on top.

Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.

item.title: Zucchini Bread
item.description:
Submitted by Patti and Ray Racine

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 3 eggs
  • 2 cups sugar
  • 1 cup oil
  • 2 cups grated zucchini
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp cinnamon
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 3 cups flour

Instructions

Mix all ingredients together. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes. Makes 2 loaves.

item.title: Bruschetta and Brew
item.description:
Submitted by Tiffany Breton and Matt Rainville

Friends of the Groom

Ingredients

  • ¼ cup white wine vinegar
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 1 tbsp fresh, chopped parsley
  • 1 tsp each of sugar and dried basil
  • ½ tsp dried dillweed
  • ¼ tsp each of salt and pepper
  • dash of hot pepper sauce
  • 1 clove of garlic, minced
  • 2 tomatoes, chopped
  • 1 cucumber, chopped
  • 1 french baguette (or bread)
  • feta cheese for topping

Instructions

In a bowl, combine all ingredients (except cheese), stir, set aside.

item.title: Banana Bread
item.description:
Submitted by Linda and Mike Gosson

Parents of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 3/4 cups flour
  • 2 tsp baking powder
  • 1/4 tsp baking soda
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1/3 cup shortening
  • 2/3 cup white sugar
  • 2 eggs, beaten
  • 1 cup mashed bananas

Instructions

Blend flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt together. In another bowl, cream shortening and sugar together. Add beaten eggs and blend. Add dry ingredients alternately with bananas.

Beat after each addition until well blended. Pour into a loaf pan and let stand for 20 minutes. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.  Poke it in the middle and if it’s still doughy-raw, then kick ’er back in for another 5 mins.

item.title: Beer Bread
item.description:
Submitted by Billy Bell

Groom

Ingredients

  • 3 cups self-rising flour
  • 1 tbsp sugar
  • 1 six-pack of beer
  • 1 tbsp butter, melted

Instructions

Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.

In a large bowl, blend the flour and sugar. Quickly mix in one can of beer. Place the mixture in a 9x5 inch loaf pan. Wet your fingers and smooth the top.

Bake for 1 hour or until golden brown. Drink the other 5 beer while you’re waiting.

item.title: Summer Pizza
item.description:
Submitted by Danielle Beaudry

Niece of the Bride

2 pkgs Pillsbury Dough Croissant Rolls

Flatten on a cookie sheet and bake at 350 degrees for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown. Let cool.

Topping:

  • ½ cup Miracle Whip
  • ½ cup Hellman’s Mayonnaise
  • 1 pkg Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing (powder)
  • 8 oz cream cheese

Mix together and spread on cooled Croissant crust.

Sprinkle with chopped veggies:

Ingredients

  • 1 cup broccoli
  • 1 cup green pepper
  • ½ cup green onions
  • ½ cup olives
  • 1 cup tomatoes

Instructions

Cover with saran wrap and pat lightly. Best if made the day before.

item.title: Ranch Style Tortilla Roll-Ups
item.description:
Submitted by Linda and Darrell Lamothe

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 pkgs Philadelphia cream cheese
  • 1 pkg ranch style dry mix
  • 8 large tortilla shells
  • 1 jar of drained and finely chopped, jalapeno peppers
  • red pimentos, drained and finely chopped
  • onion to your taste, finely chopped
  • black olives, finely chopped, optional

Instructions

Mix cream cheese with dry ranch mix. Spread evenly over tortilla shells. Sparingly top tortillas with the rest of the ingredients.

item.title: Gazpacho
item.description:
Submitted by Linda and Joe Albrechtas

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 large tin tomato juice
  • 1 can diced tomatoesor3-4 ripe, fresh tomatoes, chopped
  • ½ English cucumber, unpeeled and finely chopped
  • ½ red pepper, finely chopped (whole one if small)
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced or crushed
  • ½ red onion, finely chopped
  • 1 tsp sugar
  • ¼ cup red wine vinegar
  • approximately 2 tbsp good olive oil
  • dashes of Tabasco to taste
  • salt and pepper to taste

Instructions

Best refrigerated for a couple of hours or overnight. Serve cold, garnished with croutons.

item.title: Crab Finger Puffs
item.description:
Submitted by Nancy and Mike Potvin

Cousins of the Groom

  • 8 oz light cream cheese, softened
  • 2 tbsp grated onion
  • 4.2 oz canned crab meat, drained and cartilage removed
  • 2 tbsp fine bread crumbs
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1/16 tsp garlic powder
  • 1 lb. pkg wonton wrappers
  • cooking oil for deep frying

Mash cream cheese in a bowl. Work in onion, crab meat, bread crumbs, salt and garlic powder.

Place 1 tsp of mixture in center of each wonton wrapper. Dampen edges of wonton with water. Fold one corner at a time to centre, pressing to seal well. Cover with damp towel until ready to cook.

item.title: Cache Bay Chicken and Spinach Roll-Ups
item.description:
Submitted by Lorraine and Frank Nault

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • 2 cloves garlic, finely chopped
  • 1 cup spinach, chopped
  • 1/4 cup Dijon mustard
  • 1/2 cup yogurt
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1 tsp black pepper
  • 1/4 cup lemon juice
  • 4 large boneless, skinless chicken breasts
  • 6 slices Swiss Cheese
  • 4 thin slices smoked turkey breast
  • 4 slices lemon (optional)

Instructions

In a bowl combine garlic, spinach, mustard, yogurt, salt, half the pepper and 1 tsp of lemon juice. Gently pound the chicken breasts flat between sheets of plastic wrap. Spread the sauce on the chicken. Top each breast with a slice each of the Swiss cheese and smoked turkey. Cut remaining slices of cheese in half and set aside.

item.title: Fast Cabbage Roll Skillet
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb medium ground beef or pork
  • 2 cloves garlic, crushed
  • 1 large onion, chopped
  • 1 14-oz tin tomato sauce
  • ½ cup water
  • 1 cup 5-minute rice
  • 1 tsp paprika½ tsp dried
  • dill weed
  • ¼ tsp each salt and pepper
  • ½ head cabbage
  • sour cream

Instructions

In large, wide saucepan over medium heat, cook meat and garlic, stirring often with fork to keep meat crumbly. Add 1 or 2 tsp of vegetable oil if meat sticks.

item.title: Corey's Chicken Wings
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cups white sugar
  • 1 cup water
  • ½ tsp garlic
  • 5 Tbsp soya sauce

Instructions

Wash and place wings in pan. Melt sugar in water, Add garlic and soya sauce. Marinade for 1 hour. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 2-1/2 to 3 hours till sauce is thick and bubbly.

Stir every ½ hour.

item.title: Chicken & Dumplings
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 5-1/2 to 6 lb boiling fowl
  • 8 cups water
  • 5-6 medium-large carrots, chunked
  • 12 whole medium onions
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper

Instructions

In large soup kettle, simmer the whole fowl with the water, covered, until tender – about 4 hours. Be sure it is beginning to fall apart. Left bird to utility tray and cut it into serving pieces discarding what skin and bones you readily can. Set this meat aside for the time being. Skim as much surplus fat as you can from the top of broth.NOTE;I usually do the above a day early so refrigerated fat is easy to scoop off the next day. Add the carrots, onions, salt and pepper and cook until vegetables are tender. Put chicken pieces in stew and when stew is boiling hard, put in dumplings.

item.title: Chicken A La Chuk
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Chicken legs, breasts or whatever
  • 1 tin beef consommé or broth
  • ½ cup brown sugar
  • ½ tsp ginger
  • ½ tsp garlic salt
  • 2 Tbsp soya sauce

Instructions

Heat consommé, brown sugar, ginger, garlic salt and soya sauce on stove. Put chicken in broiler pan and pour sauce over. Bake at 350 F. for 45 to 60 minutes.

item.title: Career Girl's Spaghetti
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 tbsp salad oil or shortening
  • 1 cup minced onions
  • 1 cup sliced mushrooms
  • 3 tbsp flour
  • 4 franks, chopped
  • 1-1/2 cups tomato juice
  • 1 cup water
  • 1.5 tbsp Worcestershire
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • 2 tbsp snipped parsley
  • ¼ cup minced green pepper
  • 1 8-oz pkg spaghetti
  • Parmesan cheese

Instructions

In oil in skillet, sauté onions and mushrooms till golden. Stir in flour, chopped franks. Add tomato juice, water, Worcestershire, salt and pepper. Simmer, uncovered, 25 minutes. Add parsley, green pepper. Simmer 5 minutes longer. Meanwhile, cook spaghetti as package directs. Serve ring of spaghetti with sauce in center. Pass the cheese.

item.title: Campbell's Zesty Tomato Pork Chops
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 4 pork chops (about 1 lb/500 gr.)
  • 1 large red or green pepper,cut in strips
  • 1 can Condensed Tomato with Basil &Oregano Soup
  • ¼ cup water
  • 1 Tbsp vinegar
  • 1 Tbsp packed brown sugar
  • 1 Tbsp Worcestershire sauce
  • 3 cups hot cooked mini potatoes

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add pork chops and cook until browned on both sides. Set pork chops aside. Add pepper strips and stir fry – about 3 minutes. Drain fat. Reduce heat to medium.

item.title: Campbell's Speedy Broccoli Cheese Omelettes
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 tsp vegetable oil
  • 1 can Broccoli & Cheese Soup
  • 8 eggs
  • 2 cups cooked, chopped broccoli
  • dash ground black pepper
  • grated Parmesan cheese

Instructions

Mix eggs gradually into soup with whisk or fork. Stir in half the broccoli and pepper.

Heat 1 tsp oil in non-stick 10” skillet or omelette pan, over medium heat

Add ¾ cup egg mixture. As it begins to set, lift edges allowing uncooked egg mixture to flow to bottom. Cook until set but still moist. Top one half with ¼ cup broccoli.

item.title: Campbell's Shortcut Spaghetti & Meat Sauce
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • ¾ lb ground beef, cooked and drained
  • ¼ cup diced onions
  • ¼ cup diced celery
  • 1 can Tomato w/Basil & Oregano Soup
  • ¾ cup water
  • 5 cups hot cooked spaghetti
  • ¼ cup grated Romano or Parmesan cheese

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet and stir fry onions and celery until tender.

Stir in mixture or soup, water and cooked ground beef. Bring to boil; reduce heat to low.

item.title: Campbell's Shortcut Chicken a la King
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • ½ cup chopped red or green pepper
  • ½ cup chopped celery
  • 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • 1/3 cup milk2 cups cooked chicken, cubed
  • 1 cup frozen green peas
  • dash ground black pepper, optional
  • 4 cups hot cooked rice or pasta

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add pepper and celery and stir fry until tender crisp. Reduce heat to medium.

Stir in mixture of soup and milk Add chicken, peas and pepper. Heat through, stirring occasionally. Serve over rice or pasta. If desired, garnish with fresh parsley.

item.title: Campbell's Shortcut Beef Stroganoff
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb boneless beef sirloin or inside roundsteak, cut in strips
  • 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • 1-1/2 cups frozen green peas
  • 1 large onion, chopped
  • ½ tsp Worcestershire saucee
  • ¾ sup sour cream
  • 1/8 tsp ground black pepper
  • 4 cups hot cooked egg noodles

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add beef and cook until browned and cooked through. Add onions and stir fry until tender. Reduce heat to medium

item.title: Campbell's Orange Beef Stir-Fry
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb boneless beef sirloin or inside roundsteak, cut in strips
  • 1 medium green pepper,cut in strips
  • 1 medium onion, sliced
  • 1 can Condensed Tomato Soup
  • ¼ cup orange juice
  • 2 Tbsp soya sauce
  • 1 Tbsp vinegar
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • 4 cups hot cooked rice

Instructions

Heat half the oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add beef and stir fry until cooked through. Reduce heat to medium. Set beef aside.

item.title: Campbell's Easy Santa Fe Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 Tbsp all-purpose flour
  • 1 Tbsp chili powder
  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasthalves (about 1 lb/500 gr.)
  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lg red or green pepper, cut in strips
  • 1 can Fiesta Tomato or Tomato Soup
  • 1 cup corn niblets
  • ¼ cup shredded Cheddar or Monterey
  • 4 cups hot cooked rice
  • Jack cheese

Instructions

Mix flour and chili powder. Coat chicken with flour mixture.

Heat oil in large skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and cook until browned on both sides. Set chicken aside, Drain fat.

item.title: Campbell's Easy Chicken Broccoli Paprikash
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves,(about 1 pound/500 grams)
  • 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • 2 tsp paprika (or to taste)
  • ½ medium red pepper, cut in strips
  • 2 cups hot cooked broccoli florets
  • 1/3 cup sour cream or plain yogurt
  • 4 cups hot cooked egg noodles

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned on both sides. Set chicken aside. Reduce heat to medium.

item.title: Campbell's Easy Chicken & Broccoli Divan
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 cups hot cooked broccoli spears
  • 2 cups cooked chicken, cubed*
  • 1 can Cream of Broccoli Soup
  • 1/3 cup milk
  • ½ cup shredded Cheddar cheese
  • 3 Tbsp dry bread crumbs
  • 1 Tbsp margarine or butter, melted

Instructions

*For Easy Turkey & Broccoli Divan, substitute turkey for chicken.

Arrange broccoli and chicken in 9-inch pie plate or 2 quart shallow baking dish. Combine soup and milk; pour over broccoli and chicken.

item.title: Campbell's 2-Step Honey Mustard Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves
  • 1 Tbsp oil
  • 1 can Condensed Cream of Chicken Soup
  • 1/2 cup water
  • 3 Tbsp Dijon-style mustard
  • 1 Tbsp honey

Instructions

Brown 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves in 1 Tbsp hot oil in skillet.

Add 1 can Condensed Cream of Chicken Soup mixed with 1/2 cup water, 3 Tbsp Dijon-style mustard and 1 Tbsp honey. Cover and simmer until chicken is cooked through.

item.title: Campbell's 2-Step Lemon Broccoli Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves
  • 1 Tbsp oil
  • 1 can Condensed Cream of Broccoli Soup
  • 1/2 cup water
  • 1 Tbsp lemon juice
  • Lemon slices for garnish

Instructions

Brown 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves in 1 Tbsp hot oil in skillet.

Add 1 can Condensed Cream of Broccoli Soup mixed with 1/2 cup water and 1 Tbsp lemon juice. Cover and simmer until chicken is cooked through. Garnish with lemon slices.

item.title: Campbell's 2-Step Mushroom Pork Chops
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 pork chops
  • 1 Tbsp oil
  • 1 can Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • 1/2 cup water
  • 1/2 tsp garlic powder (optional)

Instructions

Brown 4 pork chops in 1 Tbsp hot oil in skillet.

Add 1 can Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup mixed with 1/2 cup water. If desired, add 1/2 tsp garlic powder. Cover and simmer until pork chops are cooked through.

Serves 4.

item.title: Campbell's Easy 2-Step Beefy Taco Joes
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb ground beef
  • 1 can Tomato Soup
  • 1 cup salsa
  • Cheese for topping
  • Rolls for serving

Instructions

Brown 1 lb ground beef.

Add 1 can Tomato Soup and 1 cup salsa. Heat through. Top with cheese.

Serve on rolls. Makes 8 sandwiches.

item.title: Campbell's Easy 2-Step Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 boneless chicken breasts
  • 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • 1/2 cup water

Instructions

Brown 4 boneless chicken breasts.

Add 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup and 1/2 cup water. Cover and simmer until done.

Serves 4.

item.title: Campbell's Easy 2-Step Creamy Chicken & Pasta
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless chicken breasts, cut up
  • 1 pkg frozen vegetable pasta blend
  • 1 can Cream of Chicken Soup
  • 1/2 cup water

Instructions

Brown 1 lb cut-up boneless chicken breasts.

Add 1 pkg frozen vegetable pasta blend, 1 can Cream of Chicken Soup and 1/2 cup water. Simmer until done.

Serves 4.

item.title: Campbell's Citrus Skillet Chicken & Rice
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves,(about 1 lb/500 gr.)
  • 1-1/4 cups Campbell’s Ready to UseBroth or 1 can Condensed ChickenBroth.
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • ¾ cup orange juice
  • 1 cup uncooked regular long grain rice
  • 1-1/2 cups fresh (cut-up) or frozen greenbeans
  • 1 tsp grated orange peel
  • 3 Tbsp chopped fresh parsley or l Tbsp dried parsley flakes

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned on both sides. Set chicken aside.

item.title: Campbell's Chicken & Vegetable Rice Skillet
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken breasthalves, cut in cubes
  • 1 can Cream of Chicken Soup
  • 1 cup water
  • 1 pkg (6 oz/165 g) seasoned long-grainrice mix
  • 2 cups thinly sliced carrots
  • 2 green onions, sliced

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high heat in large skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides. Reduce heat to medium.

Stir in mixture of soup, water, rice mix and carrots. Heat to a boil. Reduce heat to low.

item.title: Campbell's Chicken & Vegetable Rotini
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasts,cut in chunks
  • 1 can Condensed Cream of Celery Soup
  • 2-1/4 cups water2 cups fresh (cut-up) or frozen veggie mix
  • ½ tsp dried basil leaves
  • 2 cups uncooked rotini pasta

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add chicken and stir fry until cooked through.

Stir in mixture of soup, water, vegetables and basil; heat to a boil, stirring often.

item.title: Campbell's Broccoli Chicken Potato Parmesan
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 8 mini red-skinned potatoes, thinly sliced
  • 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasthalves, cut in strips
  • 1 can Cream of Broccoli Soup
  • ½ cup milk
  • ¼ tsp garlic powder
  • 2 cups fresh or frozen broccoli florets
  • 1/3 cup grated Parmesan cheese

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add potato slices and stir fry until tender crisp.

Add chicken and continue to stir fry until chicken is browned on all sides. Reduce heat to medium.

item.title: Campbell's Beef & Mushroom Skillet
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb boneless beef sirloin or inside roundsteak, cut in strips
  • 2 cups sliced mushrooms
  • 1 medium onion, sliced
  • 1 can Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • ½ cup water
  • 2 Tbsp Dijon-style mustard
  • 4 cups hot cooked rice

Instructions

Heat half the oil in large skillet over medium high heat. Add beef and brown until cooked through. Set beef aside. Reduce heat to medium.

Add remaining oil. Add mushrooms and onion and stir fry until tender.

item.title: Batter Franks
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 egg
  • ½ cup milk
  • 1 cup Bisquick
  • 2 tbsp yellow corn meal
  • ¼ tsp paprika
  • ½ tsp dry mustard
  • 1/8 tsp cayenne pepper
  • 1 lb (12) frankfurters

Instructions

Heat deep fat to 375 degrees. Blend egg and milk. Stir in dry ingredients. Dip frankfurters into batter. Fry until brown – 2 to 3 minutes

NOTE: Do not use previously frozen wieners as batter will not stick to them.

item.title: Barbecued Spareribs
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 lbs spareribs
  • ¼ cup vinegar
  • 1 cup sliced onions
  • ¼ cup brown sugar
  • 1 cup ketchup
  • 2 tsp dry mustard
  • 1 cup water
  • 1 tsp paprika
  • 2 tsp salt
  • 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce

Instructions

Cut ribs into serving pieces. Brown them in frying pan. Combine the remaining ingredients and pour over ribs. Cover. Bake in moderate oven at 350 degrees for 1-3/4 hrs. Spoon sauce over the ribs two or three times during baking. Then uncover and cook for 15 minutes.

item.title: Baked Chili
item.description:
Ingredients

  • ¾ lb lean ground beef
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 1 28-oz tin diced tomatoes
  • 1 10 oz tin beef broth
  • 1 14 oz tin kidney beans
  • 1 medium green pepper, chopped
  • 1 tbsp chili powder
  • ½ tsp cumin
  • 2/3 cup long grain rice
  • ¾ cup shredded cheddar cheese

Instructions

Brown beef with onion in large skillet. Drain off fat. Stir in tomatoes, ½ cup reconstituted beef broth (half broth, half water) with 28-oz tin tomatoes, kidney beans, green pepper, chili powder and cumin. Bring to a boil. Stir in rice. Pour into a 3-quart (3L) casserole. Cover. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes. Uncover and stir. Sprinkle with cheese. Bake uncovered 10 minutes longer or until rice is tender.

item.title: Aloha Sweet & Sour Pork
item.description:
• 1 lb lean boneless pork chops, cut into thin strips
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 1 tsp minced fresh ginger or ½ tsp powdered ginger
  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 pkg Polynesian mix veggies

Homemade Sauce:

Ingredients

  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 1 tsp minced fresh ginger or 1/2tsp powdered ginger
  • 1-1/2 Tbsp corn starch
  • 1/2 tsp powdered ginger
  • ½ cup fruit juice or broth
  • 1 Tbsp each sugar and ketchup
  • 2 Tbsp each vinegar and soya sauce

Instructions

Combine pork, garlic and ginger; season with salt and pepper to taste. Mix well. In large frying pan or wok over high heat, heat half of the oil. Add pork. Stir-fry 2 minutes. Remove pork from pan. Set aside.

item.title: Potato "Playdough"
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 or 5 potatoes
  • 1 to 1-1/2 cups flour

Instructions

Bake 4 or 5 potatoes in the skin until soft inside. Peel and discard the peel. Mash potatoes (Use a potato ricer to get a nice fine even texture. Combine 1 to 1-1/2 cups flour to every 2 cups of mashed potato and form a dough.

The author’s son likes to play with this dough just so he can eat the scraps. It has no raw egg in it and leaving it out for a bit, there is nothing in it to spoil. The color will gray after a while, but you add food coloring. When you make it, you won’t even notice. If you have extra, roll it into balls and press your thumb in one side and roll it across the back side of a fork. Cook in boiling water for 1 minute and serve either with tomato sauce or butter or even brown gravy.

item.title: Playdough
item.description:
PLAY DOUGH w/Kool-Aid

  • 1 cup flour
  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 pkg unsweetened Kool-Aid
  • ¼ cup salt
  • 2 Tbsp cream of tartar
  • 1 cup water

Mix flour, salt, cream of tartar and Kool-Aid in a medium saucepan. Add water and oil. Stir over medium heat 3 – 5 minutes. When mixture forms a ball in pan, remove from heat. Knead until smooth. Put in a plastic bag and refrigerate.

EDIBLE PEANUT BUTTER PLAYDOUGH

item.title: Ornament Clay Dough
item.description:
BAKEABLE “SALT CLAY”

Stir together:

  • 2 cups plain flour
  • 1 cup salt
  • 1 to 1-1/2 cups cold water
  • 2 Tbsp Cooking oil

Knead well until it forms a soft ball. Line a baking tray with aluminum foil, make the shapes you want, and bake in the oven at 300 degrees F or until hard (about one hour.)

You can use food coloring to color dough before you bake it, or paint it afterwards. A finishing coat of shellac or clear acrylic will make your salt clay products last longer.

item.title: Frontier Kitchen Chemical Garden
item.description:
FRONTIER KITCHEN CHEMICAL GARDEN

Mix:

Ingredients

  • 6 Tbsp liquid bluing
  • 6 Tbsp salt
  • 6 Tbsp water

Instructions

Add 1 Tbsp ammonia

Mix well and pour slowly over 3 or 4 small rocks, clinkers or coal in an old pie plate (or a small fish bowl). Crystals start to grow very soon and will continue as long as the liquid stays.

If you want a little colour; add a few drops cake colouring to the rocks. Set the pan where you can watch it daily.

item.title: Baker's Clay Instructions
item.description:
BAKER’S CLAY INSTRUCTIONS – Brown Bag Cookie Art

You can make really nice ornaments out of Baker’s Clay. They are colorful, durable, easy, and fun to make. This is another project that is ideal to do with children.

  • 4 cups unsifted all-purpose flour
  • 1 cup table salt
  • 1-1/2 cups cold water
  • vegetable oil
  • pastry brush
  • toothpicks
  • acrylic or tempera paints
  • brushes*
  • spray gloss polyurethane or shellac

Ingredients

  • narrow ribbons

Instructions

Mix the flour and alt together in a large bowl. Add the water and stir until the flour has been incorporated. Turn the dough out onto a smooth counter top and knead vigorously for about 5 minutes. If you don’t plan to use your Baker’s Clay right away, seal it in an airtight plastic bag so that the surface doesn’t dry and form a crust.

item.title: Smoked Whitefish
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 6 cups water
  • 2/3 cup sugar
  • ½ cup packed brown sugar
  • ½ cup pickling salt
  • 1/3 cup soya sauce
  • 2 cloves garlic, crushed
  • 1 tbsp pepper
  • 2 bay leaves, crushed

Instructions

In 5-qt glass or plastic container, combine brine ingredients. Stir until sugar and salt are dissolved. Add fillets to brine. Cover and refrigerate 12 hours or overnight. Drain; discard brine from fillets. Rinse with water. Pat dry with paper towels. Arrange fillets on cooling racks. Aair dry for 1 hour or until fillets are shiny and dry.

item.title: Salmon Pie
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 15-1/2-oz tin canned salmon
  • 1 cup liquid (liquid from salmon plus milk)
  • ½ cup soft bread crumbs
  • 1 tsp grated onions
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • 1 tbsp chopped parsley
  • 2 eggs, slightly beaten
  • ½ tsp garlic salt

Instructions

Flake salmon and add salmon liquid and milk. Stir in remaining ingredients and mix well.

Pour into a greased 8-inch pie pan and bake in a 350 degree oven for 45 – 50 minutes or until center is solid when tested with a knife.

item.title: Salmon Bisque
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 Tbsp butter
  • 3-1/2 cups milk
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 7-1/2 oz tin salmon of 1 qt canned lake trout
  • 1 stalk celery, chopped
  • salt and pepper
  • 3 Tbsp flour

Instructions

Melt butter in a saucepan and sauté onion and celery. Add flour and stir well. Add milk slowly, stirring constantly. Add salmon and season with salt and pepper. Cook over low heat until creamy and smooth.

Reheat gently if served a t later date. Serves 4. Makes a hearty first course or a full meal when served with fresh biscuits and salad.

item.title: Mary's Guide Service Secret Smoked Fish Recipe
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 cups water
  • 2 cups soya sauce
  • 2 cups apple juice
  • 1 cup packed brown sugar
  • ½ cup pickling salt
  • 2 tbsp whole black peppercorns
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • 1 tsp onion powder
  • 3 lbs lake trout, or substitute fillets (8 oz each), 1 inch thick, skin on

Instructions

Same instructions as recipe for Smoked Whitefish.

item.title: Fish Scallop
item.description:
• 4 large potatoes
  • 1 tsp thyme
  • 2 medium onions
  • ¼ tsp basil
  • 1 to 1-1/2 lb fish fillets, deboned
  • ½ tsp salt
  • ¼ tsp pepper

SAUCE:

Ingredients

  • ¼ cup butter
  • ½ tsp salt
  • ¼ cup flour
  • Dash of pepper
  • 2 cup milk
  • ½ tsp dry mustard
  • 1 cup grated Cheddar cheese (or Cheez Whiz)

Instructions

Boil 4 large potatoes until almost cooked. Slice and layer in a greased 9x13-inch dish. Slice a thin layer of onion over potato. Place a layer of thinly sliced fillet (uncooked & deboned) over.

item.title: Fake Salmon
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 7 lbs chopped pike
  • 1 cup vegetable oil
  • 1 cup vinegar
  • 1 cup tomato soup
  • 1-1/2 tbsp salt
  • 1 tbsp pepper garlic powder – optional
  • Parsley – optional

Instructions

Mix last seven ingredients together. Pour over chopped fish and leave in refrigerator overnight.

In the morning, bake at 250 degrees for 5 hours. Pack in sterilized jars.

item.title: Cheesy Baked Catfish
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup crushed cheese-flavored crackers
  • ¼ cup sesame seed
  • ½ cup butter or margarine
  • 1 tbsp snipped fresh parsley
  • 2-1/4 lbs catfish fillets, skin removed
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 2 tbsp shredded fresh Parmesan cheese
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • ¼ tsp cayenne

Instructions

Heat oven to 400 F. In shallow dish, combine crackers, sesame seed, parsley, salt, pepper and cayenne. Set aside.

In 1-quart saucepan, melt margarine over medium heat. Pour into another shallow dish. Dip each fillet first in margarine and then in crumb mixture, pressing lightly to coat.

item.title: Cheese Fish Bake
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb fish fillets (Cod)
  • 1/2 cup shredded Cheddar cheese
  • 1 can cream of mushroom soup
  • Dash of paprika
  • Salt and Pepper

Instructions

Arrange fish in greased shallow baking dish and stir soup over fish. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and cheese. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 minutes.

item.title: Blackened Fish
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 tbsp paprika
  • 2-1/2 tsp salt
  • 1 tsp onion powder
  • 1 tsp garlic power
  • 1 tsp cayenne
  • ¾ tsp white pepper
  • ¾ tsp black pepper
  • ½ tsp dried thyme leaves, crushed
  • ½ tsp dried oregano leaves
  • 2-1/4 lbs catfish, lake trout or substitute fillets (6 oz each) skin removed, cut in half crosswise.

Instructions

Build a campfire and allow it to burn down to glowing coals. In shallow bowl, combine seasoning ingredients. Set aside. Place cast-iron skillet on cooking grate over campfire. When drop of water flicked onto skillet dances across it, skillet is hot enough. Dredge both sides of each fillet in seasoning mixture.

item.title: Batter For Fish
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup buttermilk
  • 1 egg
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 tsp white pepper
  • 1-1/2 cup cornmeal
  • ½ cup flour

item.title: B. B. Q. Fish Coating
item.description:
Ingredients

  • ¼ cup mayo
  • ¼ cup white wine
  • l tbsp lemon juice
  • l clove garlic, crushed
  • l/4 tsp cayenne pepper
  • Thyme and dill, optional

item.title: Arthur Treacher-Style Fish
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 lbs fish fillet
  • Dairy buttermilk (enough to cover)
  • 1 lemon, sliced
  • 1 pint (8 oz) oil for frying
  • Dry pancake mix (for dredging)
  • 2 cups pancake mix
  • 2-1/2 cups club soda

Instructions

Soak fish fillets in buttermilk. Place lemon slices over them, cover, and refrigerate 2–3 hours to remove “fishy” taste.

Heat oil in a heavy 2-1/2 quart saucepan.

Drain off milk and cut fillets in halves (triangle shape). Dredge in dry pancake mix.

item.title: Ziti With Vegetables
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 12 oz uncooked ziti or other medium pasta
  • 2 pkg (16 oz) frozen broccoli, carrots, and water chestnuts
  • 2 Tbsp olive or canola oil
  • 2 Tbsp non-hydrogenated margarine
  • 2 tsp dried basil
  • 2 tsp dried marjoram
  • 1 tsp dried thyme
  • 3/4 tsp salt
  • 4 tsp corn starch
  • 1 cup chicken broth
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine or more broth
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese

Instructions

Cook pasta according to package directions. Meanwhile, in a saucepan, bring 1 inch of water to a boil; place vegetables in a steamer basket over water. Cover and steam for 5-7 minutes or until tender.

item.title: Zesty Barbecued Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1-1/2 cup no-salt added tomato sauce
  • 2 tsp minced garlic
  • ¼ cup plus
  • 2 Tbsp lemon juice
  • 1-1/2 tsp prepared mustard
  • 1-1/2 Tbsp Brown Sugar Twin
  • ¾ tsp ground red pepper
  • 3 Tbsp cider vinegar
  • ¼ tsp black pepper
  • 2 Tbsp low-sodium Worcestershire sauce
  • 6 (6-oz) skinned chicken breast halves

Instructions

Combine first 9 ingredients in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes. Pour 1 cup tomato sauce mixture into a large heavy-duty, zip-top plastic bag. Set aside remaining tomato sauce mixture. Add chicken to bag; seal bag, and shake until chicken is well coated. Marinate in refrigerator 8 hours, turning occasionally. Remove chicken from marinade, discarding marinade. Coat grill rack with cooking spray; place on grill over medium-hot coals (350 to 400 degrees). Place chicken on rack, and grill, covered, 8 minutes on each side or until chicken is done, basting frequently with reserved tomato sauce mixture.

item.title: Tofu Mayonnaise
item.description:
Enjoy the richness of mayonnaise with only a fraction of the energy in our smooth mayonnaise-like dressing made with tofu (bean curd) as the base.

Ingredients

  • 1 cup drained, mashed tofu
  • 2 Tbsp vinegar
  • 1 tsp Dijon mustard
  • 1 tsp soy sauce
  • 1 tsp dried parsley
  • ½ tsp garlic powder
  • ½ tsp salt

Instructions

Combine tofu, vinegar, mustard, soy sauce, parsley, garlic powder and salt in container of blender or food processor. Process about 1 minute until smooth (or beat ingredients together until smooth). Place in screw-top jar. Store, covered, in the refrigerator up to 4 weeks.

item.title: Tofu Chop Suey
item.description:
Tofu supplies the protein, and tastes similar to chicken breasts, this quick-to-prepare, colorful vegetarian main dish.

Ingredients

  • 8 oz tofu
  • 2 tsp vegetable oil
  • ¼ cup chicken or vegetable broth
  • ¼ tsp ground ginger
  • 1 cup sliced celery
  • 1 small onion, coarsely chopped
  • ¼ sweet red pepper, slivered
  • 1-1/2 cups fresh bean sprouts, washed
  • 1 Tbsp soy sauce well drained
  • Freshly ground pepper and salt

Instructions

Drain tofu; cut into ¼ “ pieces, place between layers of paper towel and weight down with a dinner plate; Let stand 10 minutes to compress and remove excess water. NOTE: I found this wasted too many paper towels; I placed tofu between two dinner plates, put a heavy weight on top and kept tipping the plates to pour off the water. It didn’t take long.). Heat oil, 2 Tbsp broth and ginger in a frypan. Add celery, onion and red pepper; stir-cook over medium heat 3 min.

item.title: Three-Bean Cassoulet
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cans (l4-1/2 oz each) stewed tomatoes
  • 1 can (19 oz) garbanzo beans or chickpeas, rinsed and drained
  • 1 can (15-1/2 oz) great northern beans, rinsed and drained
  • 1 can (15 oz) butter beans, rinsed and drained
  • 1 cup finely chopped carrots
  • 1 cup finely chopped onion
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 bay leaf
  • 2 tsp dried parsley flakes
  • 1 tsp dried basil
  • ½ tsp dried thyme
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper

Instructions

In an ungreased 3-qt baking dish, combine all ingredients. Cover and bake at 350 for 60-70 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally. Discard bay leaf before serving.

item.title: Tarragon Potato Salad
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1-1/3 lbs red potatoes, unpeeled
  • 1 small clove garlic
  • ¾ tsp dried tarragon
  • ½ cup no-oil Italian dressing
  • ½ tsp dried parsley flakes
  • 2 Tbsp minced green onions
  • ½ tsp dry mustard
  • ¾ tsp lemon juice

Instructions

Cook potatoes in boiling water to cover 15 minutes or until tender. Drain well, and cool. Cut into ¼” slices, and set aside. Combine tarragon, parsley, mustard and garlic in container of an electric blender. Cover and process 30 seconds or until pureed. Add Italian dressing and process until blended. With blender running, slowly add lemon juice, and continue to process dressing mixture until smooth. Add dressing mixture to cooked potato slices; add minced green onions, and toss well to coat. Cover and chill. Yield: 8(1/2 cup) servings.

item.title: Strawberry Raspberry Trifle
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 cups cold fat-free milk
  • 3 cups sliced fresh strawberries
  • 2 pkg (1 oz each) sugar-free instant white chocolate pudding mix
  • 1 prepared angel food cake (14 oz), cut into 1” cubes
  • 3 cups fresh raspberries
  • 3 whole strawberries, quartered
  • 1 carton (8 oz) reduced-fat frozen whipped topping, thawed

Instructions

In a bowl, whisk milk and pudding mix for 2 minutes or until slightly thickened. Place a third of the cake cubes in a trifle bowl or 3-1/2- qt serving bowl. Top with a third of the pudding, 1 cup sliced strawberries, 1-1/2 cups raspberries and a third of the whipped topping. Layer with a third of the cake and pudding, 1 cup strawberries and a third of the whipped topping. Top with remaining cake, pudding, strawberries, raspberries and whipped topping. Garnish with quartered strawberries. Serve immediately or refrigerate.

item.title: Sweet Pepper Chowder
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 6 cups chicken broth
  • 6 medium potatoes, peeled & shredded
  • 4 medium carrots, shredded
  • 4 celery ribs
  • 1 large onion, chopped
  • 1 large green pepper, diced
  • 1 large sweet red pepper, diced
  • 1 small sweet yellow pepper, diced
  • ½ cup all-purpose flour
  • 1-1/2 tsp salt
  • 1 tsp Italian seasoning
  • ¼ to ½ tsp pepper
  • 1 cup water
  • 4 cups 2% milk

Instructions

In a Dutch oven or soup kettle, combine the broth, potatoes, carrots, celery and onion; bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 20 minutes. Add the peppers; return to a boil. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until vegetables are tender. In a bowl, combine the flour, salt, Italian seasoning, Pepper and water until blended. Stir into the vegetable mixture. Bring to a boil, cook and stir for 2 minutes until thickened. Reduce heat. Stir in milk, heat through (do not boil).

item.title: Spinach Cups
item.description:
These vegetables-filled bread cups can be refrigerated up to 2 hours before baking without getting soggy.

Ingredients

  • 9 (1/2 oz) slices very thinly sliced whole wheat bread
  • ½ cup light process cream cheese, softened
  • Vegetable cooking spray
  • 1 (2-oz) jar diced pimento, drained
  • 1 (10-oz) pkg frozen chopped spinach, thawed
  • 1 small clove garlic, minced
  • 2 tsp reduced-calorie margarine
  • 1 tsp hot sauce
  • ½ cup finely chopped onion
  • 1/8 tsp salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper

Instructions

Trim crusts from bread; reserve crusts for another use. Flatten bread slices, using a rolling pin. Cut slices into quarters. Press into miniature (1-1/3”) muffin pans coated with cooking spray. Bake at 350 degrees for 5 to 7 minutes or until lightly browned. Drain spinach, press between paper towels to remove excess moisture. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray; add margarine. Place over medium heat until margarine melts. Add onion, and sauté 4 to 5 minutes or until tender. Stir in spinach; cook 2 to 3 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Combine cream cheese and next 5 ingredients in a bowl; add spinach mixture, stirring well. Spoon into bread cups (2 tsp per cup). Bake at 350 degrees for 5 minutes or until thoroughly heated.

item.title: Spicy Chili Mac
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Vegetable cooking spray
  • ½ lb firm tofu, drained and crumbled
  • 1-1/2 cup finely chopped onion
  • 1 (28 oz) can crushed tomatoes with puree, undrained
  • 1-1/3 cup finely chopped green pepper
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced 2 (15 oz) can red kidney beans, drained
  • 1 Tbsp chili powder
  • 7 oz wagon wheel pasta, uncooked
  • 1 tsp ground cumin
  • ¼ plus 3 Tbsp (1-3/4 oz) shredded reduced-fat Cheddar cheese
  • ½ tsp dried crushed red pepper

Instructions

Coat a Dutch oven with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot. Add onion, green pepper, and garlic; sauté until tender. Add chili powder and next 2 ingredients; sauté 1 minute. Stir in tofu and tomatoes. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, 15 minutes. Add beans; cook 10 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Cook pasta according to package directions, omitting salt and fat. Drain. To serve, place pasta in individual bowls; top with bean mixture and cheese.

item.title: Spicy Beef Chili
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Vegetable cooking spray
  • ½ tsp ground cumin
  • 1 lb ground round
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 1 cup chopped onion
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • 2 cloves garlic, chopped
  • 1/8 tsp ground red pepper
  • 1 (16 oz) can red kidney beans, rinsed and drained
  • Dash hot sauce
  • ½ can canned no-salt- added beef broth,
  • 1 (14 oz) can no-salt- added whole undiluted
  • tomatoes, undrained and chopped
  • 2 tsp cornstarch
  • 1-1/2 cup no-salt- added tomato juice
  • 1/4 cup plus 2 Tbsp (1-1/2 oz) shredded 40% less-fat Cheddar cheese
  • 1 tsp ground coriander

Instructions

Coat a Dutch oven with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot. Add ground round; cook until meat is browned, stirring to crumble. Remove meat from pat; drain and pat dry with paper towels. Wipe drippings from pan with a paper towel. Coat Dutch oven with cooking spray. Add onion and garlic; sauté 5 minutes or until onion is tender. Return meat to Dutch oven. Add beans and next 6 ingredients; bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. Combine beef broth and cornstarch, stirring well; add to beef mixture. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, and cook 1 minute or until thickened and bubbly. Ladle into individual bowls, sprinkle with cheese. Serve immediately.

item.title: Spaghetti With Savory Sauce
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Vegetable cooking spray
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 1 lb freshly ground raw turkey
  • 1-1/2 (6 oz) cans no-salt added tomato paste
  • 3 Tbsp minced onion
  • 6 oz spaghetti, uncooked
  • 2 cup plus 3 Tbsp water
  • 1 Tbsp freshly grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tsp dried Italian seasoning
  • ¼ tsp garlic powder

Instructions

Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot. Add turley and onion; cook over medium heat until turkey is lightly browned, stirring to crumble. Drain and pat dry with paper towels. Wipe drippings from skillet with a paper towel. Add turkey mixture, water, and next 4 ingredients to skillet. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat, and simmer 10 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally. Cook spaghetti according to package directions, omitting salt and fat; drain. Place on a serving platter; top with sauce. Sprinkle with cheese.

item.title: Shrimp Dippers
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 14 fresh snow pea pods, trimmed
  • 28 large cooked, peeled, and deveined shrimp

Instructions

Arrange pea pods in a vegetable steamer over boiling water. Cover and steam 1 minute or until crisp-tender. Remove pea pods and chill.

Separate pea pods lengthwise into 2 pieces. Wrap a pea pod half around each shrimp and secure with a pick.

Yield: 28 appetizers.

Diabetic Exchange: Free. Calories 7, Carbohydrate 0.1 g, Protein 1.4 g, Fat 0.1 g, Cholesterol 12 mg, Fiber 0 g, Sodium 14 mg.

item.title: Linguine With Fresh Tomatoes
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 8 oz uncooked linguine
  • 2 medium tomatoes, chopped
  • 6 green onions, sliced
  • ½ cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • ¼ cup minced fresh basil or 4 tsp dried basil
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tsp salt (reduce this, if necessary)
  • ½ tsp pepper
  • 3 Tbsp non-hydrogenated margarine

Instructions

Cook pasta according to package directions, Meanwhile, in a large serving bowl, combine the tomatoes, onions, Parmesan cheese, basil, garlic, salt and pepper. Drain pasta and toss with margarine. Add to tomato mixture, toss to coat.

item.title: Lemon Turkey Cutlets
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 (2-oz) turkey breast cutlets
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 2-1/2 Tbsp all-purpose flour
  • ¼ tsp freshly ground pepper
  • 2 tsp olive oil, divided
  • 2 Tbsp lemon juice

Instructions

Place cutlets between two sheets of heavy-duty plastic wrap; flatten to 1/8-inch thickness, using a meat mallet or rolling pin. Dredge in flour; set aside. Heat 1 tsp oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat until hot. Add half of cutlets, and cook 3 minutes on each side or until browned. Transfer cutlets to a serving platter; keep warm. Repeat procedure with remaining 1 tsp oil and cutlets. Sprinkle cutlets with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.

item.title: Fluffy Dumplings
item.description:
Flavor these dumplings with herbs like dill, caraway and basil for unique taste variations. These dumplings are not doughy at all, but become light and fluffy as they steam over simmering stew or soup.

Ingredients

  • 1 cup all-purpose flour
  • 2 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 Tbsp margarine or butter
  • 1/3 cup 2% milk

Instructions

Combine flour, baking powder and salt. Cut in butter until mixture resembles fine crumbs. Add milk; stir until just moistened. Divide into 6 portions and spoon onto bubbling stew or soup. Cover tightly and simmer 15 minutes without lifting the lid.

item.title: Fat-Free Gravy
item.description:
Call this a waist-watcher gravy. There are only 16 calories in one serving. Serve it over meatloaf, roast meat and mashed potatoes.

Ingredients

  • 1 cup beef broth and defatted roast drippings combined
  • 2 tsp all-purpose flour
  • 1 tsp cornstarch
  • 1 tsp ketchup
  • Pinch each of salt, freshly ground pepper and basil

Instructions

Combine beef broth, flour and cornstarch in a screw-top jar, cover and shake until well combined. Pour into saucepan, stir in ketchip, salt, pepper and basil. Stir-cook over medium heat about 2 minutes until gravy thickens.

item.title: Far East Crab Cakes
item.description:
If you’d like to serve this as an appetizer, divide the crab mixture evenly into 16 small patties, These smaller versions will have about 31 calories each.

Ingredients

  • 2 (6oz) cans lump crabmeat, drained
  • 1 tsp pepper
  • ½ cup finely chopped water chestnuts
  • 1 tsp dark sesame oil
  • ¼ cup soft breadcrumbs
  • 3 Tbsp reduced-calorie margarine
  • 1 Tbsp plus 1 tsp dried parsley flakes
  • Vegetable cooking spray

Instructions

Combine first 7 ingredients in a small bowl; stir well. Shape into 8 patties. Coat a large. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot. Add crabmeat patties and cook 6 to 8 minutes or until lightly browned on both sides, turning once.

item.title: Dip'n Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 250 gr tub spreadable cream cheese
  • ½ to ¾ cup sour cream
  • 1 cup salsa
  • 1-1/2 cups grated Cheddar cheese
  • 1 cup cubed cooked chicken (use left-over chicken or grill up a chicken breast)
  • 1 bag bite-size Nacho chips

Instructions

Preheat oven of 350 degrees. Blend cream cheese with sour cream until mixture is spreadable. Spread mixture into a 6-cup oven-safe serving dish.

Spread salsa over mixture, using enough salsa to cover evenly. Arrange chicken, then the cheese evenly over salsa.

item.title: Dilled Garden Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 (16 oz) carton 1% low-fat cottage cheese
  • ½ tsp dried dillweed
  • 2 Tbsp tarragon vinegar
  • 1 Tbsp skim milk
  • 1 Tbsp finely chopped green onions
  • Dash of coarsely ground pepper
  • 1 Tbsp dried parsley flakes
  • Fresh parsley sprigs (optional)

Instructions

Place cottage cheese and vinegar in container of an electric blender or food processor; cover and process until smooth. Combine cottage cheese mixture, green onions, and next 4 ingredients in a medium bowl; stir well. Transfer cheese mixture to a small serving bowl; cover and chill. If desired, garnish with parsley sprigs and serve with Shrimp Dippers.

item.title: Crispy Orange Roughy (Fish)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 egg whites, lightly beaten
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 2 Tbsp water
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • ¼ cup cornmeal
  • 6 (4 oz) orange roughy fillets
  • ¼ cup Parmesan cheese
  • 3 Tbsp all-purpose flour
  • ½ tsp dried oregano
  • Vegetable cooking spray
  • ½ tsp dried parsley flakes
  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil

Instructions

Combine egg whites and water in a shallow dish. Combine cornmeal and next 5 ingredients in a medium bowl; stir well. Sprinkle each side of fillet with flour, Dip fillets into egg white mixture, and dredge in cornmeal mixture. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray; add oil. Place skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add fillets, and cook 4 to 5 minutes on each side or until golden and fish flakes easily and flakes easily when tested with a fork.

item.title: Crispy Oven-Fried Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • ¼ cup plus 2 Tbsp frozen egg substitute, thawed
  • ¼ tsp garlic powder
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 1 Tbsp water
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • 1 cup crispy rice cereal, crushed
  • 1 (3-lb) broiler-fryer, cut up and skinned
  • 1/3 cup toasted wheat germ
  • ¼ all-purpose flour
  • 1 Tbsp instant minced onion Vegetable cooking spray
  • ½ tsp salt-free herb and spice blend

Instructions

Combine egg substitute and water in a shallow dish. Combine cereal and next 6 ingredients in a shallow dish. Place chicken and flour in a large zip-top plastic bag; seal bag, and shake until chicken is well coated. Dip chicken in egg substitute mixture; dredge in cereal mixture. Place chicken on rach of a broiler pan coated with cooking spray. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until chicken is tender.

item.title: Creamy French Dressing
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup ketchup
  • ½ cup reduced-fat mayonnaise
  • 3 Tbsp cider vinegar
  • 3 Tbsp honey
  • 2 Tbsp water
  • 1 Tbsp olive or canola oil
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • ½ tsp ground mustard
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • Salad greens & vegetables of your choice

Instructions

In a blender or food processor, combine the first nine ingredients; cover and process until blended. Serve over salad. Refrigerate leftovers. Yield: 1-3/4 cups

Nutritional Analysis: One serving (2 Tbsp dressing) equals 70 calories, 4 g fat (1 g saturated fat), 3 mg cholesterol, 318 mg sodium, 10 g carbohydrate, trace fiber, trace protein.

item.title: Creamy Coleslaw
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1/3 cup light sour cream
  • 1/3 cup light mayonnaise
  • ¼ cup 1% milk
  • ¼ cup Splenda Granular
  • 2 Tbsp vinegar
  • 1 Tbsp lemon juice
  • 1 tsp bottled horseradish (Optional)
  • Generous ¼ tsp salt (Optional)

Instructions

Per ¾ cup Serving of Coleslaw: Calories 80, Fat 4.5 gr (.5 saturated), Carbohydrate 8 gr, Fiber 2 gr, Protein 1 gr, Sodium 210 ml

Diabetic exchange = 1 Vegetable, 1 fat

WW = 2 points

item.title: Creamed Potato Soup
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 medium round red potatoes, peeled and sliced
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 small onion, peeled and sliced
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 4 green onions, coarsely chopped
  • 1 cup skim milk
  • 2 (20 oz) cans no-salt added chicken broth, undiluted
  • 1/8 tsp ground white pepper
  • 1/8 tsp ground nutmeg

Instructions

Combine first 5 ingredients in a 3-quart saucepan; cover and simmer 20 minutes or until potato is tender. Transfer potato mixture in batches to container of an electric blender or food processor; cover and process until smooth. Combine pureed mixture with milk and remaining ingredients. Serve warm or chilled Yield: 9 (3/4 cup) servings.

item.title: Chinese-Style Whole Pickerel
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 green onions
  • 2 Tbsp soya sauce
  • 2 carrots
  • 2 tsp Brown Sugar Twin
  • 2 Tbsp sesame oil
  • 1 Tbsp dry sherry
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 3 lb whole pickerel, gutted & cleaned
  • 1 tsp finely grated ginger root (I (Mom) used ginger powder – about ¼ tsp)

Instructions

To prepare sauce, cut the green onions and carrots into 2-inch pieces. Then thinly slice these pieces into very thin julienne strips, set aside. Heat oil in a small frying pan. Add garlic and ginger and sauté for a minute or two. Add the remaining ingredients, except fish and stir until sugar is dissolved and mixture is heated through. Remove from heat. Stir in vegetables.

item.title: Chicken Vegetable Soup
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3-1/2 cup water
  • 1 cup sliced carrot
  • 1 Tbsp chicken-flavored bouillon granules
  • 1 (8-oz)can mushroom stems and pieces,
  • 1 (14-1/2 oz) can no-salt added whole drained tomatoes, undrained and chopped
  • 1 cup diced zucchini
  • ¼ cup dried minced onion
